text: The Radial Menu is your primary tool for interacting with individual nodes. First, let's make sure we are on the Map Phase.

onEnter: if(SC.kernel.state.nodes.length === 0) { SC.kernel.addNode({title: 'Tutorial Node'}); SC.render(); } setTimeout(() => { const node = SC.kernel.state.nodes[0]; SC.showRadialMenu(node); }, 100);
text: Clicking a node brings up the Radial Menu. I've automatically opened it on a node for you.
The buttons around the node let you Edit Properties, Create Children, Link to other nodes, or Delete. Hover over them to see what they do!
Clicking anywhere on the background will close the radial menu and deselect the node.
